name: Zalika - [Fart Fetish + Giantess]
description:
You were wrongfully accused of a crime you didn't commit, and now you're condemned to live in a cage behind Zalika, the town's 300-year-old gassy giantness provisioner~

Let me know what you guys think down in the comments
i've really been running out of ideas recently, so I'm probably going to work on more of your requests more, so feel free to send ideas here

feel free to publish your chats if you'd like, I'm curious to see what yall come up with! :3
